login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your training focused and competition-ready.
login.accessibility_hint: enable accessible mode at any time in settings.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Set up your athlete profile and sync your training history.
register.password_hint: Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers
register.terms_label: I accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
register.join_subtitle: Fill in the details below to start your archery journey.
register.terms_accept_prefix: I have read and accept the
register.terms_error: Please accept the terms to continue.

forgot_password.title: Recover password
forgot_password.message: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
forgot_password.description: Don't worry, it happens to the best archers. Enter your email below and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

verification.title: Verify your email
verification.message: Check your inbox and confirm your email before entering the app.
verification.sent_message: We sent a verification link to your registered email address. Please check your inbox.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.message: Paste the action code from the email and set a new password.
reset_password.description: Your new password must be unique to protect your archer account.

validation.name_min_chars: Name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.password_min_chars: Password must contain at least 8 characters.

action.register_success: Account created. Verify your email to continue.
action.reset_email_failed: Unable to send the reset email.
action.verification_failed: Unable to send the verification email.
action.user_reload_failed: Unable to refresh the current user.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Quick access to timer, scoring and accessibility settings.

timer.title: Competition timer
timer.subtitle: Configure countdown rules for 3 or 6 arrows.

register_end.title: Register end
register_end.subtitle: Capture arrows and metrics directly from the shooting line.

spotter.title: Spotter mode
spotter.subtitle: Let another person register your end with accessible flow.

history.title: Training history
history.subtitle: Review sessions, averages, X count and ten count.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.subtitle: Adjust contrast, timer assistance and multimodal feedback.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your athlete identity, language and unit preferences.

accessibility.title: Accessible timer
accessibility.description: Adds 10 extra seconds for each arrow.

register.title: Register end
register.spotter_toggle_desc: Check if another person is scoring

spotter_mode.title: Spotter mode
spotter_mode.description: Use this screen when someone else is recording the end for the athlete.
spotter_mode.info_subtitle: Confirm the details of the assisted operation

accessibility.title: Accessibility

high_contrast.label: High contrast theme
high_contrast.description: Increase color contrast and visual separation.

timer_mode.label: Accessible timer mode
timer_mode.description: Adds extra time to each arrow according to the rules.

announcements.title: Screen reader announcements
announcements.subtitle: Announce important changes like timer completion.

haptic.title: Haptic feedback
haptic.subtitle: Support time-critical actions with vibration feedback.

accessibility.personalize_title: Personalize the app for your comfort.
accessibility.personalize_subtitle: All actions have visible buttons and extended touch areas.
accessibility.text_size_hint: Adjust size for dynamic reading (Dynamic Type)

name.label: Name
name.subtitle: This name is shown in your athlete profile.

email.label: Email
email.subtitle: Your sign-in email comes from Firebase Authentication.

language.label: Preferred language
language.subtitle: Choose the app language for navigation and scoring screens.

units.label: Distance unit
units.subtitle: Define how field distances are represented.
